content_fingerprint: openai open sources mrc networking protocol to shrink ai training failures at scale openai has contributed a new networking protocol called mrc multipath reliable connection to the open compute project targeting the reliability bottlenecks that plague large distributed ai training runs openai has released mrc multipath reliable connection a networking protocol designed to make large scale ai training clusters more resilient to hardware failures the protocol has been contributed to the open compute project ocp an industry body that publishes open hardware and infrastructure specs for data cente
